tagline: Real-time money streaming on Initia. Money flows, not moves.
description: Fluvio is a real-time money streaming protocol on a dedicated Initia appchain. Instead of sending lump-sum payments, users stream INIT continuously at rates like 0.00116 INIT/second. Initia's 100ms blocks make this genuinely real-time — not a JavaScript illusion like Superfluid on Ethereum. Session keys (auto-signing) enable streams that run for days without wallet popups. .init usernames replace hex addresses. The Interwoven Bridge lets users deposit from any chain. The appchain captures 0.1% fee on all streamed value.

contracts.name: stream_vault
contracts.description: Per-user escrow vault — holds deposited INIT and tracks locked vs free balance

contracts.name: stream_core
contracts.description: Core streaming logic — rate_per_ms calculation using Initia millisecond timestamps

contracts.name: stream_registry
contracts.description: Public stats oracle — global flow rate, total streams, all-time value

why_initia: Fluvio's value proposition is inseparable from Initia. 100ms blocks make the streaming counter genuinely real-time. Session keys make multi-day streams possible without wallet popups. .init usernames make payment identity human-readable. Interwoven Bridge makes cross-chain onboarding native. Remove any of these four features and Fluvio degrades to something that already exists on Ethereum.
revenue_model: 0.1% platform fee on all streamed value captured by the fluvio-1 appchain. Scales linearly with streaming volume.
